title: Repository: /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public. Explore-only task. Do not edit files. Find the minimum input contract to generate a brand-new x-auto post draft. Inspect /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/CLAUDE.md, account_profile.py, and any relevant creation functions. Return the shortest list...
summary_text: Minimum input contract for a **new draft** is: 1) `text` (or `body_ja`) — non-empty post body. 2) `status = draft` (or omit and let default apply). 3) `id` — row identifier (UUID-like). 4) `created_at` — timestamp string. 5) `scheduled_for` — scheduling field (for draft can be `''` in the documented manual flow). Useful defaults/auto-filled behavior: 1) `status` defaults to `draft` in notion mapping if omitted. 2) `title` is derived from body text when not supplied. 3) `scheduled_for` can be blank when creating the draft; scheduler flow later works from SoT/approval. 4) `id` is typically generated with `uuid4()` in generator flow; `created_at` set to `now`. 5) `source_url`/`reply_url` are optional for creation, but for quote/article workflows they are required by instruction/gating expectations (URL belongs in `Source URLs`/`source_url`, not raw body). References: - [CLAUDE.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/CLAUDE.md) (manual draft registration flow, required status draft, scheduled_for default pattern, quote URL handling, source/reply URL rules) - [account_profile.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/account_profile.py) (posting/style and quote/source URL constraints) - [schema.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/schema.py) (`PostRecord`, required-fields list, status set) - [auto_generator.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/auto_generator.py) (how generated draft records are assembled, defaults for id/created_at/status) - [notion_sync.py](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py) (`push_new_to_notion`, `_post_record_to_notion_properties` defaults such as status/title/scheduled/source_url)
